typecheck.command: echo "cc-sentiment has no typecheck baseline (no pyright/mypy config in project); skipping per services.yaml policy"

lint.command: cd client && uv run --with ruff ruff check cc_sentiment/tui tests/test_tui.py

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add a testing note for Textual worker-thread paths: when code under test executes subprocess checks in worker threads, patch at the subprocess boundary (e.g., discovery.subprocess.run) rather than only high-level helpers to avoid intermittent mock leakage.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature deflake-check-remotes-cancel-on-remote-back-gh-mock fixed an intermittent TimeoutExpired(['gh', 'auth', 'status'], 10) by patching cc_sentiment.signing.discovery.subprocess.run in the affected test path.
